codeReview.summary: Pass. The follow-up removes the original signature-only dedupe path and assigns stable per-instance sandbox identity keys while rebuilding an annotated reachable-agent graph, so structurally identical same-name sandbox agents no longer collapse onto one runtime/session. Runner startup and resume now use that annotated graph, and the new regression proves distinct workspaces survive RunState JSON round-trips and approval resume.

summary: Reviewed the prior failure, mission metadata, worker handoff/transcript skeleton, rust-sandbox-worker guidance, architecture/services docs, and both composition-related diffs. Commit 0b5e76c fixes the duplicate-identity collapse by annotating each reachable sandbox agent instance with a stable key, wiring run/resume through those keys, and adding a structurally-identical duplicate-name regression that demonstrates separate workspace preservation across serialization and resume. No new blocking issues were identified.
